Name: Soldier
Traits: Base class unit. Gets Strong while adjacent to the Commander leader.

Name: Commander
Traits: Leader. Slow by default. Spell Resistance. Reinforcement gains halved. Adjacent friendly units gain Strong.

Name: Warrior
Traits: Base class unit.

Name: Warleader
Traits: Leader. No default Slow. Spell Resistance. Reinforcement gains halved.

Name: Mage
Traits: Base class unit.

Name: Archmage
Traits: Leader. Slow by default. Spell Resistance. Reinforcement gains halved. Grants +1 AP next turn if it held position.

Name: Barricade
Traits: Summoned structure created by the Barricade card.

Name: Grandslime
Traits: Splits into 2 Slimes on death.

Name: Slime
Traits: Splits into 2 Slimelings on death.

Name: Slimeling
Traits: Small slime spawned by larger slimes.

Name: Troll
Traits: Large brute used by the Trolls encounter.

Name: Alpha Wolf
Traits: Only unit that can use Pack Hunt.

Name: Wolf
Traits: Pack unit that supports Alpha Wolf.

Name: Ice Spirit
Traits: Encounter pressures player units with Chilled and Slow synergies.

Name: Fire Spirit
Traits: Has Scalding: attack damage also applies Burn.

Name: Lightning Spirit
Traits: Has Lightning Barrier.

Name: Bandit
Traits: Humanoid encounter unit with three art variants.

Name: Necromancer
Traits: Slow. Spell Resistance. Reinforcement gains halved. Raises skeletons from fallen player units.

Name: Skeleton Soldier
Traits: Minion skeleton raised by Necromancer.

Name: Skeleton Warrior
Traits: Minion skeleton raised by Necromancer.

Name: Skeleton Mage
Traits: Minion skeleton raised by Necromancer.
